testcase.name: test_05_pool_2_access_denied_for_internal_staff

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Staff should NOT have access to Pool 2, got 200 assert 200 == 403 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pool1_routing_fix.py:130: in test_05_pool_2_access_denied_for_internal_staff assert response.status_code == 403, f"Internal Staff should NOT have access to Pool 2, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Internal Staff should NOT have access to Pool 2, got 200 E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_06_pool_2_access_denied_for_partner

failure.message: AssertionError: Partner should NOT have access to Pool 2, got 200 assert 200 == 403 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pool1_routing_fix.py:144: in test_06_pool_2_access_denied_for_partner assert response.status_code == 403, f"Partner should NOT have access to Pool 2, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Partner should NOT have access to Pool 2, got 200 E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
